publishedAbstract:
* The Prometheus pods are throwing a `many-to-many matching not allowed: matching labels must be unique on one side` error after upgrading ODF from 4.16 to 4.17. ~~~ $ oc logs prometheus-k8s-0-c prometheus-n openshift-monitoring | grep-i ceph ts=XXXX-XX-XXTXX:XX:XX.XXXZ caller=group.go:492 level=warn name=cluster:ceph_disk_latency:join_ceph_node_disk_irate1m index=1 component="rule manager" file=/etc/prometheus/rules/prometheus-k8s-rulefiles-0/openshift-storage-prometheus-ceph-v16-rules-XXXXX.yaml group=ceph.rules msg="Evaluating rule failed" rule="record: cluster:ceph_disk_latency:join_ceph_node_disk_irate1m
expr: avg(topk by (ceph_daemon) (1, label_replace(label_replace(ceph_disk_occupation{job=\"rook-ceph-mgr\"},
 \"instance\", \"$1\", \"exported_instance\", \"(.*)\"), \"device\", \"$1\", \"device\", \"/dev/(.*)\"))
 * on (instance, device) group_right (ceph_daemon) topk by (instance, device) (1,
 (irate(node_disk_read_time_seconds_total[1m]) + irate(node_disk_write_time_seconds_total[1m])
 / (clamp_min(irate(node_disk_reads_completed_total[1m]), 1) + irate(node_disk_writes_completed_total[1m])))))
" err="found duplicate series for the match group {device=\"sdX\"} on the left hand-side of the operation: [{__name__=\"ceph_disk_occupation\", ceph_daemon=\"osd.X\", container=\"mgr\", device=\"sdX\", device_ids=\"sdX=XXXXX\", devices=\"sdX\", endpoint=\"http-metrics\", job=\"rook-ceph-mgr\", managedBy=\"ocs\", namespace=\"openshift-storage\", pod=\"rook-ceph-mgr-X-XXXXX\", service=\"rook-ceph-mgr\"}, {__name__=\"ceph_disk_occupation\", ceph_daemon=\"osd.X\", container=\"mgr\", device=\"sdX\", device_ids=\"sdX=XXXXX\", devices=\"sdX\", endpoint=\"http-metrics\", job=\"rook-ceph-mgr\", managedBy=\"ocs\", namespace=\"openshift-storage\", pod=\"rook-ceph-mgr-X-XXXXX\", service=\"rook-ceph-mgr\"}];many-to-many matching not allowed: matching labels must be unique on one side" ~~~ * The alert `PrometheusRuleFailures` is triggered for the rule_group `/etc/prometheus/rules/prometheus-k8s-rulefiles-0/openshift-storage-prometheus-ceph-v16-rules-XXXXX.yaml`. * Either of the Prometheus rules `prometheus-ceph-v14-rules` or `prometheus-ceph-v16-rules` exist along with `prometheus-ceph-rules`. ~~~ $ oc get prometheusrules-n openshift-storage NAME AGE noobaa-prometheus-rules 1y ocs-prometheus-rules 3y prometheus-ceph-rules 2y prometheus-ceph-v14-rules 3y prometheus-ceph-v16-rules 2y ~~~
publishedTitle: Duplicate alerts after upgrading ODF cluster from 4.16 to ODF 4.17
